news.title: ASX seesaws; Telstra CEO apologises; energy stocks slide
news.snippet: The Australian stock exchange seesawed in early trade as energy companies, supermarkets and industrial firms like Brambles weighed on the local bourse, while miners and banks helped lifted the market.

news.title: Pub portfolio sells in $500m deal to MA Financial
news.snippet: Investment house MA Financial has swooped on four pubs in NSW’s Hunter Valley and two in Sydney.

news.title: Should older workers still be expected to do night shifts?
news.snippet: It’s important organisations don’t assume that all older workers are less capable of taking night shifts than their younger colleagues.

news.title: Karl Stefanovic’s love affair with the British far right blooms
news.snippet: Former Today host Stefanovic is doing better than his old show weeks after leaving Nine, at least on a superficial measure. But that success might not last forever.

news.title: Why skyscrapers in my hometown don’t bother me
news.snippet: Higher housing density gets a bad rap from many sensible Australians. But here’s why the alternative is worse for us all.
